changeSet.author: CIV Developer - Pk

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test name' AND french = 'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur'

changeSet.comment: Add missing localizations for Odeur tests
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.localization(id, description, english, french, lastupdated) VALUES (nextval('localization_seq'), 'test name', 'Macroscopy – Cervical-Odor', 'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur', now()), (nextval('localization_seq'), 'test report name', 'Macroscopy – Cervical-Odor', 'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur', now()), (nextval('localization_seq'), 'test name', 'Macroscopy – Vulva-Odor', 'Macroscopie – Vulve-Odeur', now()), (nextval('localization_seq'), 'test report name', 'Macroscopy – Vulva-Odor', 'Macroscopie – Vulve-Odeur', now()), (nextval('localization_seq'), 'test name', 'Macroscopy – Vaginal Mucosa-Odor', 'Macroscopie – Muqueuse vaginale-Odeur', now()), (nextval('localization_seq'), 'test report name', 'Macroscopy – Vaginal Mucosa-Odor', 'Macroscopie – Muqueuse vaginale-Odeur', now()), (nextval('localization_seq'), 'test name', 'Culture – Vaginal Secretions', 'Culture – Secrétions vaginales', now()), (nextval('localization_seq'), 'test report name', 'Culture – Vaginal Secretions', 'Culture – Secrétions vaginales', now()), (nextval('localization_seq'), 'test name', 'Culture – Cervical', 'Culture – Col', now()), (nextval('localization_seq'), 'test report name', 'Culture – Cervical', 'Culture – Col', now());

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description IN ('test name', 'test report name') AND french IN ('Macroscopie – Col-Odeur', 'Macroscopie – Vulve-Odeur', 'Macroscopie – Muqueuse vaginale-Odeur', 'Culture – Secrétions vaginales', 'Culture – Col');

changeSet.author: CIV Developer - Pk

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur'

changeSet.comment: Create all vaginal secretions tests with proper names
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test(id, method_id, uom_id, description, loinc, reporting_description, sticker_req_flag, is_active, active_begin, active_end, is_reportable, time_holding, time_wait, time_ta_average, time_ta_warning, time_ta_max, label_qty, lastupdated, label_id, test_trailer_id, test_section_id, scriptlet_id, test_format_id, local_code, sort_order, name, orderable, guid, name_localization_id, reporting_name_localization_id, default_test_result_id, notify_results, parent_test_id, parent_trigger_value, is_culture_test, culture_type, is_flora_count_test) VALUES ( nextval('test_seq'), null, null,'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur','',null,null, 'Y', null,null,'N',null,null,null,null,null,null,now(), null, null, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bacteriology' LIMIT 1),null,null,'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur',6270, 'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur', 't','a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890', (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test name' AND french = 'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test report name' AND french = 'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur' LIMIT 1), null, 'N', (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Macroscopie – Col Leucorrhées' LIMIT 1), 'Présentes', false, null, false );

INSERT INTO clinlims.test(id, method_id, uom_id, description, loinc, reporting_description, sticker_req_flag, is_active, active_begin, active_end, is_reportable, time_holding, time_wait, time_ta_average, time_ta_warning, time_ta_max, label_qty, lastupdated, label_id, test_trailer_id, test_section_id, scriptlet_id, test_format_id, local_code, sort_order, name, orderable, guid, name_localization_id, reporting_name_localization_id, default_test_result_id, notify_results, parent_test_id, parent_trigger_value, is_culture_test, culture_type, is_flora_count_test) VALUES ( nextval('test_seq'), null, null,'Macroscopie – Muqueuse vaginale-Odeur','',null,null, 'Y', null,null,'N',null,null,null,null,null,null,now(), null, null, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bacteriology' LIMIT 1),null,null,'Macroscopie – Muqueuse vaginale-Odeur',6271, 'Macroscopie – Muqueuse vaginale-Odeur', 't','b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-f12345678901', (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test name' AND french = 'Macroscopie – Muqueuse vaginale-Odeur' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test report name' AND french = 'Macroscopie – Muqueuse vaginale-Odeur' LIMIT 1), null, 'N', (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Macroscopie – Muqueuse Vaginale Leucorrhées' LIMIT 1), 'Présentes', false, null, false );

INSERT INTO clinlims.test(id, method_id, uom_id, description, loinc, reporting_description, sticker_req_flag, is_active, active_begin, active_end, is_reportable, time_holding, time_wait, time_ta_average, time_ta_warning, time_ta_max, label_qty, lastupdated, label_id, test_trailer_id, test_section_id, scriptlet_id, test_format_id, local_code, sort_order, name, orderable, guid, name_localization_id, reporting_name_localization_id, default_test_result_id, notify_results, parent_test_id, parent_trigger_value, is_culture_test, culture_type, is_flora_count_test) VALUES ( nextval('test_seq'), null, null,'Macroscopie – Vulve-Odeur','',null,null, 'Y', null,null,'N',null,null,null,null,null,null,now(), null, null, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bacteriology' LIMIT 1),null,null,'Macroscopie – Vulve-Odeur',6272, 'Macroscopie – Vulve-Odeur', 't','c3d4e5f6-a7b8-9012-cdef-123456789012', (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test name' AND french = 'Macroscopie – Vulve-Odeur' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test report name' AND french = 'Macroscopie – Vulve-Odeur' LIMIT 1), null, 'N', (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Macroscopie – Vulve Leucorrhées' LIMIT 1), 'Présentes', false, null, false );

INSERT INTO clinlims.test(id, method_id, uom_id, description, loinc, reporting_description, sticker_req_flag, is_active, active_begin, active_end, is_reportable, time_holding, time_wait, time_ta_average, time_ta_warning, time_ta_max, label_qty, lastupdated, label_id, test_trailer_id, test_section_id, scriptlet_id, test_format_id, local_code, sort_order, name, orderable, guid, name_localization_id, reporting_name_localization_id, default_test_result_id, notify_results, parent_test_id, parent_trigger_value, is_culture_test, culture_type, is_flora_count_test) VALUES ( nextval('test_seq'), null, null,'Culture – Secrétions vaginales','',null,null, 'Y', null,null,'Y',null,null,null,null,null,null,now(), null, null, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bacteriology' LIMIT 1),null,null,'Culture – Secrétions vaginales',6273, 'Culture – Secrétions vaginales', 't','d4e5f6a7-b8c9-0123-def1-234567890123', (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test name' AND french = 'Culture – Secrétions vaginales' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test report name' AND french = 'Culture – Secrétions vaginales' LIMIT 1), null, 'N', null, null, true, 'NORMAL', false );

INSERT INTO clinlims.test(id, method_id, uom_id, description, loinc, reporting_description, sticker_req_flag, is_active, active_begin, active_end, is_reportable, time_holding, time_wait, time_ta_average, time_ta_warning, time_ta_max, label_qty, lastupdated, label_id, test_trailer_id, test_section_id, scriptlet_id, test_format_id, local_code, sort_order, name, orderable, guid, name_localization_id, reporting_name_localization_id, default_test_result_id, notify_results, parent_test_id, parent_trigger_value, is_culture_test, culture_type, is_flora_count_test) VALUES ( nextval('test_seq'), null, null,'Culture – Col','',null,null, 'Y', null,null,'Y',null,null,null,null,null,null,now(), null, null, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bacteriology' LIMIT 1),null,null,'Culture – Col',6274, 'Culture – Col', 't','e5f6a7b8-c9d0-1234-ef12-345678901234', (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test name' AND french = 'Culture – Col' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test report name' AND french = 'Culture – Col' LIMIT 1), null, 'N', null, null, true, 'NEISSERIA_GONORRHOEAE', false );

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.test WHERE name IN ( 'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur', 'Macroscopie – Muqueuse vaginale-Odeur', 'Macroscopie – Vulve-Odeur', 'Culture – Secrétions vaginales', 'Culture – Col' );

changeSet.author: CIV Developer - Pk

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Secrétions vaginales'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.sampletype_test st JOIN clinlims.test t ON st.test_id = t.id WHERE t.name = 'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur'

changeSet.comment: Map vaginal secretions tests to sample type
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.sampletype_test(id, sample_type_id, test_id) VALUES (nextval('sample_type_test_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Secrétions vaginales' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Macroscopie – Col-Odeur' LIMIT 1)), (nextval('sample_type_test_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Secrétions vaginales' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Macroscopie – Muqueuse vaginale-Odeur' LIMIT 1)), (nextval('sample_type_test_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Secrétions vaginales' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Macroscopie – Vulve-Odeur' LIMIT 1)), (nextval('sample_type_test_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Secrétions vaginales' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Culture – Secrétions vaginales' LIMIT 1)), (nextval('sample_type_test_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Secrétions vaginales' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Culture – Col' LIMIT 1));
